name: Churchill Capital Corp V
description: Churchill Capital Corp V is a blank check company formed for the purpose of effecting a merger, capital stock exchange, asset acquisition, stock purchase, reorganization, or similar business combination with one or more businesses. The company intends to focus its search for a target business in the information services, software, and technology-enabled services sectors, leveraging the experience and expertise of its management team and sponsor to identify and acquire a high-growth business.
